title: Identify customs and land rights for an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Community
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify customs and land rights for an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Community demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify the role of traditional customs in Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Communities

pcs.text: Identify and record traditional customs of the Community related to own work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record traditional customs of the Community related to own work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record traditional customs of the Community related to own work.

pcs.text: Identify and record traditional gender-specific roles that relate to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander land management practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record traditional gender-specific roles that relate to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander land management practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record traditional gender-specific roles that relate to Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander land management practices.

pcs.text: Identify and record changes that have occurred in traditional customs related to management of Country since British colonisation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record changes that have occurred in traditional customs related to management of Country since British colonisation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record changes that have occurred in traditional customs related to management of Country since British colonisation.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify the role of traditional customs in Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Communities

elements.title: Outline impact of native title rights and interests recognised under non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander law

pcs.text: Outline briefly the process to be followed in applying for native title
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Outline briefly the process to be followed in applying for native title?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Outline briefly the process to be followed in applying for native title.

pcs.text: Provide an overview to Community members of the difference between native title rights and land rights
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide an overview to Community members of the difference between native title rights and land rights?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide an overview to Community members of the difference between native title rights and land rights.

pcs.text: Identify and communicate the type of rights the Community has, or wants for a particular land or site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and communicate the type of rights the Community has, or wants for a particular land or site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and communicate the type of rights the Community has, or wants for a particular land or site.

pcs.text: Identify organisations or groups that can provide advice relating to native title land claims
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify organisations or groups that can provide advice relating to native title land claims?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify organisations or groups that can provide advice relating to native title land claims.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Outline impact of native title rights and interests recognised under non-Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander law

elements.title: Propose appropriate applications of traditional customs

pcs.text: Identify and record examples of successful native title applications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record examples of successful native title applications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record examples of successful native title applications.

pcs.text: Identify and record the traditional customs used for decision-making processes in the Community
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record the traditional customs used for decision-making processes in the Community?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record the traditional customs used for decision-making processes in the Community.

pcs.text: Determine traditional activities or sacred sites relevant to native title land and confirm with Cultural Authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine traditional activities or sacred sites relevant to native title land and confirm with Cultural Authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine traditional activities or sacred sites relevant to native title land and confirm with Cultural Authorities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Propose appropriate applications of traditional customs

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
